nasb.text: In proportion to the extent of the years you shall increase its price, and in proportion to the fewness of the years you shall diminish its price, for it is a number of crops he is selling to you.

esv.text: If the years are many, you shall increase the price, and if the years are few, you shall reduce the price, for it is the number of the crops that he is selling to you.

cnv.text: 年數多，你付的買價就要增多。年數少，你付的買價就要減少。因為他是按出產的數值賣給你。

ccb.text: 距下个禧年的年数多，价钱就高；年数少，价钱就低。因为卖的是田地收成的次数。
